_comment: Edit this file to update links, timings, and behavior across the whole site. No code changes needed.

googleSheet._comment: The published Google Sheet that stores meme submissions (File > Share > Publish to web > CSV).

googleForm._comment: Form used to collect meme submissions.

liveWindow._comment: Window during which the broadcast is considered LIVE and submissions/list refresh accordingly. Use 24-hour HH:MM. Set enabled:false to make it always-live (24x7).

qrPage._comment: What the QR code on the stream-overlay page points to. Usually the same as googleForm.viewLink.

safety._comment: Links containing any of these keywords/domains are hidden from the list.
